title: Do you think Gendo dyes his hair
display_title: Do you think Gendo dyes his hair
wikitext:
[]: Do you think Gendo dyes his hair?             Quote Post by MuscleRobo » Thu Jul 25, 2019 11:02 am Sorry for the silly topic but hey that's what the Chit-Chat sub-forum is for right? I was looking for some information on Gendo and scrolled to the wiki and noticed his age. Once you're 48 I'd assume most people are at least going grey right? I suppose in a world where people can have blue or purple hair it doesn't matter but I kind of like the idea of the character so many people think is a Commander Cool Guy being so vain he makes sure to pick up some hair dye at the pharmacy on the way home from work.

[]: Re: Do you think Gendo dyes his hair?             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Fri Jul 26, 2019 3:42 am Nah, Gendo ain't insecure enough for it.

[]: Re: Do you think Gendo dyes his hair?             Quote Post by BC Baron » Fri Jul 26, 2019 1:00 pm To answer your question, Yes, but just the pubes (probably got the idea from one of his late night hookups with Dr. Akagi).

[]: Re: Do you think Gendo dyes his hair?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Aug 02, 2019 12:13 am He barely bothers to zip his uniform, so I doubt it. Lucky genetics, I'd wager. Perhaps Shinji shall also be so fortunate.
